doc: The fixed second document for the M1 restart-swap device-gap ritual (docs/mcp-swap-ritual.md). A deliberately, obviously different sound from bass.json — a pure 220 Hz (A3) sine, an octave-plus up from the 55 Hz saw drone — so when it replaces the bass over the structure channel the ~100 ms restart gap and the switch to the new timbre are unmistakable by ear. Self-contained (no resources) so the swap target never drifts against the instrument library.
